title: The Strange Case of Clayton Quayle

scenes.text: Remains identified after 47 years uncover dark secrets.
Clayton Quayle's remains were found near Norris, Montana.
He was reported missing in 1976. For decades, his case puzzled investigators.
His disappearance and recent identification have rekindled interest in unsolved cases.
How did he end up there? The answers remain shrouded in mystery.
scenes.label: UNEXPLAINED CIRCUMSTANCES

scenes.text: Follow if the unknown keeps you up at night.

description: 📍 Norris, USA - 1976. Clayton Quayle's remains were identified after 47 years, highlighting an old mystery that still needs answers about his fate. Follow for daily mysteries!
